halemn rose, wait a turn. get his gen card, tawil exalt and hope you get a good dps card. use rouse card on it to duplicate it (also being duped from tawil exalt) gdoll ult for damage amp, caecus ult for vuln, red tenct stance. use your big damage card

you can use halemn rouse also on your wing generation card, so you get alot of twins in the deck. pretty much just play as they come usually. you can also dupe six wings with your ult if you dont get any good card pulls put if you're using OE exalt, you get 10 cards to choose from so its harder to not have a good card come up

They say the blue realm is the easiest, is caro bad for new players?
you'll have to learn how to play the game (ie not relying on tentacle damage) for dtide anyways, it's just a matter of when
i'd say the only "bad" banner for new players is chaos actually since those have mostly supportive units

as for "blue realm is easiest"
that is true for the most part, it gives a lot of utility, however, it relies on carries from other realms to perform properly in the harder parts of the game
(or just crazy investment into blue limited units, but that's not an option anyone can just take)
My beloved
Is tawil worth pulling or is it better to save for anni unit?

that's going to be tricky to answer since we don't know the anni unit's kit yet. Tawil is arguably among the strongest unit of the game at OE, pain to play at E0, it's highly recommended to have at least E1.

Anni unit being a Genesis, it's likely she will be very strong based on our other released Genesis, GHelot and GDoll. GRamona is good but niche
but while GMurphy could be very strong, there's a possibility she would be so only at at least E3 (GHelot) or OE (GDoll)
so I hope you will have enough summons either way
got it, so basically try to get e1 tawil then save

hopefully someone chimes in, as I'm not a Tawil expert, but I think Tawil's optimal investment is E2 as it gives prepare 1 to all the cards she gets from her exalt.
But minimum viable should be E1 for sure
that said, we'll likely know GMurphy kit 3-4 days before the end of the trio banner with Tawil, so if you're patient, you could have better idea on how to spend your silver in that timeframe
I reckon I would be overwhelmed with teambuilding, but... Guess I'll reroll then;)
Depends on how far along you are on story. Anniversary rewards gives 50-200 limited pulls depending on the latest story chapter you have cleared. Tawil is very versatile though.
Yeah, she wants E1 for DPS, E2 for more comfort especially for Bluewill (a lot of aequor cards are expensive lol)

I see, thanks!
There's no real downside of this sympton, is there? The card just goes to discard pile like others do, no downside?
This is one of the worst symptoms in the game
Hmmm...why?
It adds an additional copy into the deck
ADDITIONAL being the key word
As in you have more and it kills your draw
Oh so I could get it every turn and due to it replacing a Command Card from one of my characters, it's bad?
Or I misunderstood u
Symptoms are bad because they represent a dead draw, do you understand that? If you don’t play card games you might not be familiar.
But basically it’s like you drew one less card, and that’s objectively bad
This specific symptom will constantly replicate itself adding more and more dead draws whenever you play it
It's actually my first card game hehe, I thought that It could be good since It gives me 2 cards in replacement.
It’s effectively -1 arith to draw 1. Not the worst rate, not good. and it just continues to get worse
It's fine if the boss fight is short. Symptoms are usually bad in card games because they do nothing. Symptoms in Morimens can be played for effects.
I’ve been playing card games all my life and just trust me when I say symptoms are nearly never worth it
